purpose: Frame B Stage 1 license keyword vocabulary. Frozen before any candidate collection.
canonical_json_basis: SHA-256 of json.dumps(response, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')) over the raw GET /licenses array.

entries.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0
GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

excluded_rule: Keys whose spdx_id is null or NOASSERTION, and the keys 'other' and 'noassertion', are excluded because they provide no explicit terms. None of the returned entries met that rule.

rate_limit_snapshot.note: core and search are separate REST buckets; request ceilings and wall time are computed per bucket.

known_limitations: GET /licenses returns GitHub's commonly-used license list, not every SPDX identifier, so the Stage 1 vocabulary is bounded by what GitHub repository search supports.
A repository search license match reflects GitHub's classifier, which is not terminal evidence; exact pinned revision artifacts must still be inspected before any row is selected.
